app.title: Partner portal for schools, publishers, and procurement.
app.description: A modern, role-based workspace for catalogue discovery, training enablement, RFQ workflows, orders, and visibility—built for bilingual EN/AR and RTL support.
app.name: Panworld School Partner Portal

schoolDashboard.overviewSub: Procurement, samples, training, and support at a glance — tap a tile to open the detail view.
schoolDashboard.pipelineSub: Counts by stage for your school (demo data).
schoolDashboard.activitySub: Latest updates linked to your account.

activity.sampleShippedMeta: Jolly Phonics KG kit · tracking shared

checklist.demo: Try a demo for one product
checklist.sample: Request a sample or demo login

checklistAccordion.infoBody: Complete each section so your school can quote, order, and train without delays. Your account manager can help with any step.

recoShare.title: Learn & Earn
recoShare.step1: Share your school portal link with colleagues.
recoShare.step2: They explore the catalogue with your school’s context.
recoShare.step3: You earn rewards for each successful colleague sign-up.

schoolDashboard.featuredSub: Discover the newest editions available for your region
schoolDashboard.curriculumMapSub: Tell us your grade range and subject areas. Our AI will instantly recommend the right Panworld products tailored to your school.

catalogue.subtitle: All textbook products — filtered for your {{curriculum}} curriculum
catalogue.detailOverviewBody: Curriculum alignment, country editions, and key differentiation — replace with live CMS content when available.
catalogue.detailCurriculumSub: Why this title fits your school context.
catalogue.detailPriceNote: Indicative price. Final pricing confirmed via quotation.
catalogue.accessExpiredTitle: School access to this series has expired
catalogue.accessExpiredBody: Your licence for this catalogue folder is no longer active. Request renewal and our team will confirm pricing and access.
catalogue.accessRequested: Request sent (demo). Panworld will contact your school admin.
catalogue.passwordProtectedHint: Some digital assets in this folder may require a password after access is granted.
catalogue.folderItemsSub: ISBN and list price are stored per item. RFQs and orders typically reference individual grades.

library.subtitle: Supplementary reading and library titles — separate from core textbooks
library.bannerBody: Library book requests go through a dedicated supply chain. Your library RFQ basket is separate from textbook RFQs.

kits.subtitle: Educational kits — science, phonics, and classroom sets
kits.jollyBannerBody: Complete phonics kit sets for KG1–KG2. Just arrived at Panworld — exclusive regional distribution.

curriculum.title: ✦ Curriculum Mapping Tool

curriculum.placeholderSub: Fill in your school profile and click Generate

demo.title: Demo Access Hub
demo.subtitle: All publisher demos in one place — credentials delivered instantly via email & WhatsApp
demo.instantBody: Shared publisher logins are sent within seconds. School-specific logins (StudySync, PowerSchool) are provisioned within 24 hrs.
demo.resendToast: Credentials resent to your school email and WhatsApp.
demo.modalAccessIntro: Use the credentials below in a private browser window. Do not share outside your school.
demo.modalAccessFoot: A copy can also be emailed to your registered school contact.
demo.modalRequestIntro: Tell us who needs access. Your account manager will provision logins within 24 hours.
demo.fieldNotesPh: e.g. Need Arabic UI, timing for live walkthrough…
demo.requestSubmitted: Request queued — you will receive confirmation shortly (mock).

wishlist.subtitle: Products you're evaluating — convert to RFQ when ready
wishlist.nudge2: Your account manager has been notified. Still interested?
wishlist.empty: Your wishlist is empty. Browse the catalogue to add titles.

announcements.subtitle: Publisher news, new editions, and Panworld updates
announcements.pinnedTitle: Jolly Phonics KG Kits Now Available
announcements.pinnedBody: Panworld is now the exclusive UAE & Saudi distributor for Jolly Phonics KG kits. Complete phonics sets for KG1–KG2 classrooms are now in stock and available to order.

publisherAccess.noResults: No credentials match your search and filters.
publisherAccess.cardCredentialToggleAria: Turn this demo credential on or off for all shared schools.
publisherAccess.credentialEnabledToast: Demo access enabled for this credential.
publisherAccess.credentialDisabledToast: Demo access disabled for all schools on this credential.
publisherAccess.openDetailAria: View shared schools and validity for {{title}}
publisherAccess.detailIntro: Schools that currently have this demo access, and when each share is valid.
publisherAccess.accessToggleAria: Toggle demo access for {{school}}. When off, this school cannot use the credentials even before the valid-until date.
publisherAccess.detailAccessOverrideNote: Turning access off here stops use of these credentials for that school immediately, even if the valid-until date is still in the future.
publisherAccess.detailEmpty: This credential is not shared with any school yet.
publisherAccess.detailSearchPlaceholder: Search schools by name or territory…
publisherAccess.detailNoFilterMatch: No schools match your search and filters.
publisherAccess.detailFootnote: Dates reflect the validity window for each school’s share of this demo access.

accountManagers.validationRequired: Name, email, and mobile are required.
accountManagers.assignSchoolsHint: Select the schools in this account manager’s portfolio. Counts on the card update when you save.

publishers.title: Publisher partners
publishers.subtitle: Commercial publishers connected to the portal — contacts, coverage, and status
publishers.tableHint: Click a card to view full publisher details.
publishers.logoHint: PNG or JPG. Shown in the directory and on partner cards. Max ~2 MB.
publishers.brandAccentHint: Sampled from the publisher logo — used for the card border, left panel tint, and highlights.
publishers.validationRequired: Name, territory, and contact email are required.
publishers.deleteConfirm: Delete publisher "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

catalogueFolder.accessBody: Control whether this series requires a password for digital assets, and whether the school’s entitlement is active.
catalogueFolder.accessFootnote: Expiry and passwords are demo flags — wire to entitlements in production.
catalogueFolder.pricingModelBody: List price and ISBN are maintained per book or SKU inside the folder, not on the series card.
catalogueFolder.itemsCardsHint: Card view — cover, ISBN, and price are stored per item.
catalogueFolder.demoHint: Demo only — line items are static mock data.
catalogueFolder.passwordGateBody: This folder is protected. Enter the passcode to view books and SKUs.
catalogueFolder.bookModalIntro: Capture each purchasable unit: one row per grade book, stage pack, or kit component.
catalogueFolder.bookModalDisplayTitlePh: e.g. Inspire Science Grade 4 Student Edition
catalogueFolder.bookModalNote: Saving publishes this line item to the school catalogue and RFQ catalogue for the grades it covers.
catalogueFolder.bookModalCoverSub: PNG, JPG · shown on line-item card
catalogueFolder.bookModalMaterialHint: Add a public link, or upload a file — PDF, PowerPoint, Excel, or other supported formats. Use one or both.
catalogueFolder.bookModalFileUploadSub: PDF, PPT, PPTX, XLS, XLSX, CSV, and other office formats

users.title: User management
users.subtitle: All portal roles · assign schools and account managers
users.subtitleAccess: Role-based access — what HOD, School Admin, and Sales can do in the portal
users.accessIntro: HOD and School Admin can invite teachers directly, request Panworld to provision sensitive roles, and manage their school’s users. Sales / account managers can onboard schools, assign catalogue and resource access, and maintain school–AM mappings. Panworld Admin retains full override.
users.createdRequest: User creation request sent to Panworld operations (mock).
users.editHint: Update profile and permissions. Connects to live directory in a later release.
users.provisionPolicyHint: School-side roles: teachers can usually be provisioned immediately; elevated roles may require Panworld approval per your access policy (see Access control tab).
users.provisionMode: How should this account be created?
users.provisionDirectHint: Send invite or activate the login when policy allows.
users.provisionRequestHint: Opens a ticket for Panworld Admin when the role is restricted for your profile.

assignments.title: School assignments
assignments.subtitle: Map schools to sales / account managers
assignments.accessNote: Sales roles with permission to map schools and assign resources should use this view together with Schools. See the capability matrix for details:

accessMatrix.footnote: * School CEO and other leadership accounts follow the same school-side rules as School Admin unless your tenancy is configured differently. Enforced in API and SSO policies in production.

schools.title: School onboarding
schools.subtitle: Browse schools below; Edit updates the school and its users. Add School creates the school and the first School Admin login. Countries (with default VAT), curricula, and school groups are stored in the database — use + Add next to each field to create a new option.
schools.formHint: The first user is always a School Admin — they can add teachers and other roles later from the school portal.
schools.vatByCountryHint: Set automatically from the selected country’s default VAT in the database.
schools.curriculumFromDbHint: Options come from the database. Use + Add curriculum to add a new one without leaving this form.
schools.countryFromDbHint: Options come from the database. Use + Add country to register a new country and its default VAT.
schools.refCountryInvalid: Enter a country code, display name, and a VAT rate between 0 and 100.
schools.whatsappHint: Official school WhatsApp (digits, +, spaces, or brackets; 8–40 characters).
schools.logoFileHint: PNG, JPG, WebP or GIF, max 2 MB. If you upload a file, the URL field is ignored.
schools.schoolAdminHint: This account is created as School Admin. They can invite other staff from the school portal.
schools.roleHint: Choose a school-side role. School Admin is the portal operator account.
schools.createdOk: School {{schoolId}} created. Admin can sign in with {{email}}.
schools.editHint: Update profile and branding. Manage users below — add teachers and other roles for this school.
schools.usersSectionHint: Add staff who can log in to this school. The first School Admin was created with the school.

assignProducts.accessFull: Full access — browse, demo, RFQ, order
assignProducts.notifyWhatsApp: Notify school of new product access via WhatsApp
assignProducts.confirmDeactivate: Deactivate {{name}}? This is a UI-only action in this build.
